pending.label: Pending users
pending.description: Registrations held by Onumia until an admin approves or rejects them.
pending.rejectDescription: Selected registrations will be marked rejected or deleted depending on the rejection setting.
pending.drawerDescription: Inspect the pending registration before deciding.

approval.label: Approval
approval.description: Registration approval policy and notification behavior.
approval.notifyAdmin: Notify admin of new pending registration
